# ChartNetwork

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ChartNetwork;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ChartNetwork { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
statistics, analytics, diagram, graph, topology, cluster, web, nodes, connections, edges

## Categories
charts
